aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are unlikely to cite Cost Plus Heating & Air due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but with targeted improvements, they can become a strong local authority.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data for common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a reliable local HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Portland, OR' where AI prioritizes structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with the necessary context.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications (e.g., NATE, Energy Trust) and partnerships to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI to recommend them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.
